args.command:
mkdir -p /workspace/lib /workspace/test && cat > /workspace/mix.exs <<'EOF'
defmodule Wordcount.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :wordcount,
      version: "0.1.0",
      elixir: "~> 1.14",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      escript: [main_module: WordcountCLI]
    ]
  end

  def application do
    [
      extra_applications: [:logger]
    ]
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/wordcount.ex <<'EOF'
defmodule Wordcount do
  @moduledoc """
  Word counting utilities for the wordcount CLI.
  """

  @doc """
  Counts words in a string.

  Words are contiguous runs of non-whitespace characters.
  """
  @spec count_words(String.t()) :: non_neg_integer()
  def count_words(text) when is_binary(text) do
    text
    |> Regex.scan(~r/\S+/u)
    |> length()
  end

  @doc """
  Counts words in a file.

  Returns `{:ok, count}` on success or `{:error, reason}` if the file cannot be
  opened.
  """
  @spec count_words_from_file(Path.t()) :: {:ok, non_neg_integer()} | {:error, atom()}
  def count_words_from_file(path) when is_binary(path) do
    case File.open(path, [:read, :utf8]) do
      {:ok, io} ->
        try do
          count =
            io
            |> IO.stream(:line)
            |> Stream.map(&count_words/1)
            |> Enum.sum()

          {:ok, count}
        after
          File.close(io)
        end

      {:error, reason} ->
        {:error, reason}
    end
  end
end
EOF

cat > /workspace/lib/wordcount_cli.ex <<'EOF'
defmodule WordcountCLI do
  @moduledoc false

  @usage "Usage: wordcount <file>"

  def main(args \\ System.argv()) do
    args
    |> parse_args()
    |> run()
  end

  @doc false
  def parse_args([path]) when is_binary(path) do
    {:ok, path}
  end

  def parse_args(["--help"]) do
    {:ok, nil}
  end

  def parse_args(["-h"]) do
    {:ok, nil}
  end

  def parse_args(_) do
    {:error, "expected exactly one file argument"}
  end

  @doc false
  def run({:ok, nil}) do
    IO.puts(@usage)
    :ok
...
cd /workspace && mix test
